case_title: ELSIE ALMENDAREZ VS. OLEG PAUL OVETS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALMENDAREZ, ELSIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OVETS, OLEG PAUL SHYNGIRII, NATALIIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALMENDAREZ, ELSIE AS TO DEFENDANT OVETS, OLEG PAUL SHYNGIRII, NATALIIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED NOV-03-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OVETS, OLEG PAUL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF'S SON JOSE ALMENDAREZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. INNA KUPRIYANOVA INTERPRETS ENGLISH/RUSSIAN - RUSSIAN/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2009 - JUDGMENT.
